series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence from the chair, Vice-chair, member of the Commission, or the Executive Director dealing with the administration of the office. Includes both paper and electronic (email) materials. Subject matter includes agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal, and personnel matters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years then transfer to State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain two years then transfer to State Archives., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
